title: Shirley Crenshaw
compiled_truth: Shirley Crenshaw is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-01-30), Shirley Crenshaw sent 396 and received 1752 emails, totalling 2148 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (285), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (96), [Pinnamaneni Krishnarao](people/pinnamaneni-krishnarao) (80), [Vasant Shanbhogue](people/vasant-shanbhogue) (76), [Zimin Lu](people/zimin-lu) (74). Mailbox folders observed: accounting, c, calendar, conferences, consultants, deleted_items.
